news.headline: Magma Power reveals 18th patent for detecting and drilling through magma reservoirs, with 19 worldwide patents.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 5, 2025, Magma Power LLC introduced an innovative drilling technique and system allowing for accurate identification and controlled drilling into underground magma reservoirs. This cutting-edge technology, safeguarded by nineteen global patents, sets a new standard in geothermal exploration and production.

news.headline: Beyond Oil delivers 10.8T order to Latitude as part of agreement. Receives payment with US$8.3M minimum for 2025.
news.summary: Following a recent announcement, Beyond Oil has successfully delivered its first order and received the payment for January as per the previously disclosed agreement. The agreement includes minimum commitments totaling US$8.3 million for the year 2025.

news.headline: Market update: Dow Jones up, Nasdaq recovers losses despite Google drop; Small caps outperforming. Navidia rises, MicroStrategy falls before earnings.
news.summary: In the stock market today, small caps showed a strong performance, outperforming other sectors. The Nasdaq managed to mitigate losses as Google stock, Mueller Water, and Fiserv presented new entry points for investors. The Dow Jones also saw gains, partly due to Nvidia's rise. However, Google faced a decline, while MicroStrategy fell ahead of its earnings report. This dynamic movement in the market was covered live without explicitly mentioning the source.

news.headline: Rayonier Q4 2024 net income $327.1M, $2.15 per share, on revenues $726.3M, up from $126.9M, $0.85 per share, $467.4M in prior year.
news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) announced a fourth quarter net income attributable to Rayonier at $327.1 million, equating to $2.15 per share, with revenues totaling $726.3 million. This marks a significant increase from the previous year's fourth quarter figures of net income at $126.9 million, or $0.85 per share, and revenues of $467.4 million. Notably, the fourth quarter results were boosted by $291.1 million in income from Large Dispositions, along with a $1.6 million gain from the termination of a cash flow hedge.

news.headline: PVH Corp. declares $0.0375/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on March 26, 2025 to stockholders of record on March 5. PVH is a global fashion company with iconic brands like Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER.
news.summary: PVH Corp. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share payable on March 26, 2025, to stockholders of record on March 5, 2025, as revealed by the Executive Committee of the Board of Directors. PVH Corp. is a leading global fashion company with a presence in over 40 markets. It boasts iconic brands like Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER, holding a history spanning over 140 years that is underpinned by brand strength.

news.headline: $40K worth of eggs stolen in Pennsylvania amidst shortage, leaving 100,000 missing. Shoppers nationwide dealing with high prices and empty shelves.
news.summary: Authorities reported that eggs valued at $40,000 were stolen, coinciding with a national trend of empty shelves and increased egg prices in grocery stores.

news.headline: UGI Corp (NYSE: UGI) declares $0.375 quarterly dividend per share of common stock, payable April 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2025.

This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 17, 2025. UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) is a leading distributor and marketer of energy products and services across the United States and Europe, providing secure and sustainable energy solutions to customers through its subsidiaries.

news.headline: EnerSys declares dividend of $0.24 per share for Q4 of FY 2025. Board of Directors announced the payment on March 28 to holders as of March 14.

news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN) announces Tony Moralejo stepping down as Applebee's President, effective March 4, 2025. John Peyton to serve as Interim President.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Dine Brands Global, Inc. disclosed that Tony Moralejo will resign as President of Applebee’s, a subsidiary, on March 4, 2025. Following his departure, he will act as an advisor until June 4, 2025. John Peyton, the CEO of Dine Brands, will take over as the Interim President of Applebee’s while maintaining his current position. Dine Brands oversees prominent dining establishments such as Applebee’s Neighborhood Grill & Bar, Fuzzy’s Taco Shop, and IHOP. The company is publicly traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DIN.

news.headline: GoodRx appoints Christopher A. McGinnis as CFO, bringing 30 years of healthcare finance experience. Effective Feb 4, 2025.
news.summary: Headquartered in Santa Monica, California, GoodRx (Nasdaq: GDRX) revealed the appointment of Christopher A. McGinnis as their new Chief Financial Officer, starting from February 4, 2025. With a remarkable 30 years of financial expertise in the healthcare sector, McGinnis previously held the position of CEO at CitizensRx. During his tenure at CitizensRx, he spearheaded the provision of pharmacy benefit management services to corporate clients. This strategic addition is expected to bolster GoodRx's financial leadership team, enhancing their position as the premier prescription savings platform in the United States.

news.headline: Hillenbrand reports Q1 2025 results, announces sale of majority stake in Milacron, $287 million deal, revenue $707 million, EPS $0.09, adjusted EPS $0.56, backlog $1.82 billion, updated guidance with adjusted EPS of $2.45 - $2.80.
news.summary: Hillenbrand, Inc. reported their fiscal first quarter results, ending December 31, 2024, with a revenue of $707 million, a 9% decrease from the previous year, and a GAAP EPS of $0.09, down from $0.24. The company sold a majority stake in Milacron for $287 million, expecting $250 million in net proceeds for debt paydown. The annual guidance was updated to reflect this transaction, with adjusted EPS of $2.45 - $2.80 for the remaining businesses. Hillenbrand's net debt was $1.7 billion, and they had liquidity of approximately $632 million. The Milacron transaction is expected to be completed in the fiscal second or third quarter, and the fiscal 2025 outlook remains stable despite potential tariff impacts and foreign currency fluctuations.

news.headline: Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK) to release Q4 earnings on Feb. 26, 2025; CEO Jim Brickman to host earnings call.
news.summary: Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK) based in Plano, Texas, declared it as the third largest homebuilder in Dallas-Fort Worth and one of Fortune Magazine’s rapidly expanding companies in 2023. It is also recognized as the fastest growing public homebuilder. The company is scheduled to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31st, 2024, subsequent to the market closure on February 26th, 2025. The CEO, Jim Brickman, will conduct an earnings conference call to review the results.

news.headline: Stewart's Q4 2024 revenues reach $665.9M ($664.2M adjusted) with net income of $22.7M ($31.5M adjusted) - strong growth.
news.summary: In the current quarter, total revenues reached $665.9 million, or $664.2 million on an adjusted basis, marking an increase from the previous year's $582.2 million, or $577.4 million on an adjusted basis. Net income for the quarter was $22.7 million, or $31.5 million on an adjusted basis, which is significantly higher than the previous year's $8.8 million, or $16.6 million on an adjusted basis.

news.headline: BrightView Holdings reported 4.4% decrease in Q1 FY2025 revenue to $599.2 million, with a 36.6% improvement in net loss.
news.summary: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV), a prominent commercial landscaping services firm in the United States, disclosed its unaudited financial outcomes for the first quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. The latest figures reveal a 4.4% year-over-year decline in total revenue to $599.2 million. This drop was primarily propelled by the deliberate decrease in non-core businesses while being partially mitigated by a rise in revenue from core operations. Additionally, the net loss demonstrated a noteworthy improvement of 36.6% compared to the previous period.

news.headline: Bank of America to redeem all Series AA Preferred Stock and Depositary Shares with liquidation preference of $25,000 per share.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, Bank of America Corporation made public its decision to buy back all remaining shares of its Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series AA with the CUSIP number 060505EP5. The redemption value is set at $25,000 per share.

news.headline: Encompass Health named to Fortune's Most Admired Companies list for 5th year. Largest inpatient rehab operator in the US.
news.summary: Encompass Health Corp, listed on the NYSE as EHC and headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, has been recognized on Fortune's 2025 World's Most Admired Companies list. This corporation stands as the largest inpatient rehabilitation hospital owner and operator nationwide. This acknowledgment further solidifies their esteemed position in the industry.

news.headline: Terreno Realty Corp declares quarterly dividend; files 2024 financial statements in Bellevue, WA.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - Terreno Realty Corporation has announced the declaration of its quarterly dividend. Additionally, the company has filed its financial statements for the year 2024. This move showcases the corporation's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders while maintaining transparency in its financial operations. This announcement highlights Terreno Realty Corporation's dedication to its investors and ensures clarity regarding its financial performance in the year 2024.

news.headline: Sphinx Investment Corp. extends tender offer to purchase all outstanding common shares of Performance Shipping Inc.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, New York-based Sphinx Investment Corp. disclosed an extension of the expiry date for its offer to acquire all the existing common shares of Performance company. The Common Shares, valued at $0.01 per share, are the subject of the acquisition deal.

news.headline: Kirkland's secures $25M investment from Beyond, Inc., strengthening strategic partnership and receiving strong shareholder support.
news.summary: The company Kirkland's, Inc. (Nasdaq: KIRK), based in Nashville, Tennessee, received significant support from its shareholders for a proposal related to the Beyond Transaction at a special meeting held on February 5, 2025. Kirkland's is a specialty retailer known for its home décor and furnishings. The strong backing from shareholders indicates a positive response to the company's plans for the future, reflecting confidence in the execution of the proposed transaction.

news.headline: Titan International, Inc. will announce Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 26 and hold a webcast on Feb 27 at 9am ET.
news.summary: Chicago-based Titan International, Inc. is scheduled to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 26, 2025, post-market closure. The subsequent teleconference and webcast will take place on February 27, 2025, starting at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this event to gain insights into the company's quarterly results.
